title: OpenAI rolls out a faster reasoning model
description: The new model reduces latency while keeping tool-use quality high.

title: Google announces updates to Search and Workspace
description: The company is pushing more AI-assisted workflows into everyday products.

column8:
# OpenAI rolls out a faster reasoning model

The release improves response time and keeps the model suitable for tool-heavy workflows.

Key detail: the update is aimed at production assistants that need lower latency.

# Google updates Search and Workspace

Google is adding more AI-assisted task flows across Search and Workspace.

The main implication is tighter integration between information retrieval and office work.
